title: 'The war in Iran is limited to three countries, but the list of collateral victims keeps growing'

title: Calder at the Fondation Louis Vuitton in Paris, a festive experience
subhed: The exhibition spans the sculptor's entire body of work and takes over the entire building, spilling out onto the exterior. The journey is a joyful celebration, filled with lightness and movement.

title: The Curtis Yarvin conundrum: Should one debate with the far right?
subhed: The reactionary American blogger close to the Trumpian figures was invited to a symposium in Germany with prominent scholars. Some critics say the invitation signals that red lines have vanished from intellectual debate.
